entries.text: SDXL is trained around 1024x1024; prefer ~1MP totals (1024x1024, 1152x896, 896x1152) for clean composition.
SDXL needs fewer steps than SD 1.5 for coherent results; 25-40 steps at CFG 5-7 is a strong default.
SDXL parses natural-language descriptions well — full descriptive phrases beat keyword soup.
